title: The Resonance Foundation | Support Music Education Today
description: The Resonance Foundation is a non-profit organization dedicated to empowering young musicians by providing access to music education. Empowering Minds, Inspiring Change.
taglineExtended: Empowering Minds, Inspiring Change Through Music Education
heroDescription: Connecting passionate young musicians with experienced tutors to inspire creativity, build confidence, and foster a lifelong love of music.
footerBlurb: Empowering young musicians by providing access to music education. Run by passionate high school students.
footerCredit: Made with love by student musicians
